# Insert technical text into thesis (Portuguese)

Task:
- Insert the provided technical paragraph(s) into the most appropriate place in the existing LaTeX chapter(s).

Rules:
- Do not invent data/results.
- Keep the writing consistent with the surrounding chapter.
- Add/adjust section headers only if necessary.
- Maintain labels and references.
- If the insertion depends on a figure/table/citation not present, add a placeholder and clearly label what is missing.

What I will provide:
- The text to insert
- The target chapter(s) or a hint where it belongs
